message: fix: add broken docs link to ignore-links.txt for arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensions

body:
## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ✅ **verify-links (Build Analyze)**: Broken link `https://learn.microsoft.com/javascript/api/@azure/arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensions` (docs page not yet published for this new package). Auto-fixed in commit [`3c2bf911a36`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/commit/3c2bf911a36) — URL added to `eng/ignore-links.txt`.

<!-- mgmt-review-bot -->

No API design issues found. The `@azure/arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensions` 1.0.0 stable release has a clean public API surface: version strings are aligned across `package.json`, `extensionsContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`; `KnownVersions` includes both stable API versions (2024-11-01, 2025-03-01); no `_N`/`AutoGenerated`/`_`-prefix naming issues; no unsafe `unknown` in return types; and all public symbols are properly exported.
